name: Colorful Times - Further optimization for performance and efficiency

description: Optimized schedule cache with proper LRU eviction

asi.hypothesis: Replace naive cache clear with proper LRU eviction for better cache hit rates

description: Cache preprocessed schedule in core.lua to avoid redundant parsing

asi.hypothesis: Avoid re-parsing schedule on every theme resolution by caching preprocessed schedule

description: Optimize init.lua lazy loading with O(1) key lookup

asi.hypothesis: Replace vim.tbl_contains with static lookup table for faster __index check

description: Optimize state.lua validation with static lookup table

asi.hypothesis: Replace vim.tbl_contains with static lookup table for background validation

description: Optimize system.lua with static lookup for supported platforms

asi.hypothesis: Use static lookup table instead of string comparisons for platform detection

description: Cache snacks detection result in tui.lua

asi.hypothesis: Avoid repeated pcall(require, "snacks") by caching the result

description: Add caching to schedule.next_change_at and optimize background validation

asi.hypothesis: Cache next_change_at results and use static lookup for background validation

description: Use cached parsed schedule in arm_schedule_timer

asi.hypothesis: Avoid re-parsing schedule by using cached _parsed_schedule in arm_schedule_timer

description: Use vim.uv.now() for faster time calculations instead of os.date()

asi.hypothesis: Replace os.date("*t") with uv.now() for faster current time retrieval

description: Cache colorscheme list in tui.lua to avoid repeated getcompletion calls

asi.hypothesis: Avoid expensive vim.fn.getcompletion() calls by caching colorscheme list

description: Move validation lookup table to module level to avoid table creation per call

asi.hypothesis: Avoid creating {light=true,dark=true,system=true} table on every validate() call

description: Add debounced state saves to reduce disk I/O during rapid TUI changes

asi.hypothesis: Batch rapid state writes with 500ms debounce timer to reduce disk I/O

description: Cache static TUI header to avoid rebuilding on every render

asi.hypothesis: Avoid reconstructing static header lines on every TUI render call

observations: Core is loaded via lazy metatable but validation happens in setup
Next change calculation and timer setup happens in enable() which is called from setup
